basic_details.job_title: ICMR NIHR Field Supervisor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR - National Institute of Health Research
basic_details.short_information: ICMR - National Institute of Health Research (ICMR NIHR) Field Supervisor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website main.icmr.nic.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICMR NIHR Field Supervisor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: Admissible for SC/ST, OBC, Government Employees, Departmental Candidates, Ex-servicemen, and Experienced and skilled persons for other research projects.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Public Health / Nursing / Life Sciences / Social Work / Allied Health Sciences with 2 years' experience in community-based health projects, preferably NCD or surveillance studies OR Postgraduate degree in Public Health / Nursing / Life Sciences / Social Work / Allied Health Sciences.
qualification.details: Field Supervisor: Bachelor's degree in Public Health / Nursing / Life Sciences / Social Work / Allied Health Sciences with 2 years' experience in community-based health projects, preferably NCD or surveillance studies. OR Postgraduate degree in Public Health / Nursing / Life Sciences / Social Work / Allied Health Sciences.

selection_process: Walk-in-interview / Written Test Skill Test (wherever applicable) Merit list based on Written Test and Interview performance
